title: Linociera zeylanica

This family is part of the larger order Sapindales, which comprises various families of flowering plants. The Sapindaceae family is known for its diverse range of species, including trees, shrubs, and vines. Linociera zeylanica is native to tropical regions, particularly in Sri Lanka, and is often found in humid environments. The classification of Linociera zeylanica is further supported by its anatomical and morphological characteristics, which align with the Sapindaceae family.
